title: Olfersia cervina

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Olfersia cervina include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
